profile.name: Dimael
profile.title: Shadow Hunter Dimael
profile.dislike: His fellow kinsmen who let his sister die
profile.story: This lonely Dark Elf swore vengeance against his own race for the death of his sister. Having barely survived his deployment to the Aegina Desert, the only thing waiting for him back home was the dreadful news that his sister had been killed as an Elven sacrifice. As he cried out her name in the darkness, he began succumbing to madness. Eventually, he swore an oath of hatred and vengeance against his own kind, the murderers of his sister.

1.name: Dark Rampage
1.description: Deals [ffc800]257*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 121.1% ATK[-] M.DMG to 1 enemy [64ffff]4[-] time(s), then loads a powerful arrow and deals [ffc800]445*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 196.6% ATK[-] M.DMG.

2.name: Black Shackle
2.description: Deals [ffc800]927*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 407.4% ATK[-] Magic Damage to enemies within range and [fa96fa]roots[-] them for [64ffff]3.5 sec[-].

3.name: Shadow Wave
3.description: Targets 1 enemy and deals [ffc800]1093*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 479.3% ATK[-] Magic Damage to enemies in a line, [fa96fa]blinding[-] them for [64ffff]3.5 sec[-].

4.name: Black Stain
4.description: On hit, deals [ffc800]57*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 25% ATK[-] additional Magic Damage to the target, and this skill gains an extra [64ff64]1000[-] Magic Defense Penetration.

light.effect: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.effect: On hit, has a 25% chance to blind the target for 3 sec.

light.effect: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.effect: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.
On Normal Attack, has a 10% chance to use the [Dark Barrage] skill.
On Normal Attack, deals additional Magic Damage equal to 80% of Attack Power and restores 100 Mana. There is a 10% chance for both the damage and Mana recovery effects to be doubled.

uw.name: Tears of the Moon, Nerius
uw.description: On hit, has a {0}% chance to deal Magic Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and reduce the cooldown of all skills by 10%.
uw.story: A treasure of the Dark Elves created using a powerful moonlight stone from Arrovina and a moon tree branch of the highest quality. Nerius is a perfect medium for Moonlight Magic, and it is one of the most powerful magic weapons of the Dark Elves. However, it is said that the beautiful silver light of the moon can easily be tainted by darkness. A sublime love has turned into deep darkness, and the dark elf longing for vengeance has fused that darkness into this weapon.

1.name: Vow of Black Moon
1.description: [Dark Rampage] Dispels all negative effects from self and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.
1.story:
One of the daggers that Dimael shared with his comrades dispatched in Aegina.
When the Black Moon rose in the desert sky, he gave them these daggers and they all vowed to face their destiny.
They supported each other and tended to each other's wounds while fighting the evil creatures storming out from the rift.
However, he was the only one who returned alive from Aegina.

2.name: Unbreakable Bracelet
2.description: [Black Shackle] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.
2.story:
A bracelet that was shared with Epigael a long time ago. It has shadow morion hanging, which is a precious jewel amongst the Dark Elves. 
It is said that those who cut off the shadow morion and will have a thread of their souls, which will lead them to meet again in the next life.

3.name: Eye of Shadows
3.description: [Shadow Wave] Increases DMG by 50% and the duration of Blind by {0} sec.
3.story:
Tear fragments of the beast Heltanios, who lived at the bottom of the Fountain of Life. It spews out pitch darkness, and those who see its eyes end up having their souls stolen by the powerful dark energy.
Those who become the master of these eyes will obtain great power and insight. When Dimael was captured in Aegina and was at the brink of death, Maria embedded these eye fragments.

4.name: Black Crown
4.description: [Black Stain] Increases the Range of normal attacks by 20%, each hit increasing DMG by {0}%. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.
4.story:
The crown of Dark Elves.
Remebering the fall and tragedy of his race and the royal family, Dimael still can't wear this bloody crown.
All he can do is watch it and wait for the day the true king of Dark Elves appears.

sw.requirement: Charges up upon using Skills [64ff64]5[-] times.
sw.description:
Summons the soul of Tears of the Moon, Nerius, dealing [ffc800]400% of ATK[-] M.DMG to frontal enemies and inflicting [fa96fa][Curse of the Moon][-] for [64ffff]10sec[-], and increases own Crit DMG by [64ff64]70%[-].

[fa96fa][Curse of the Moon][-]: Increases M.DMG taken by [64ff64]12%[-] and reduces Heal Rate by [ff6464]12%[-].

advancement.2: For the duration of Skill, increases own ATK by 40%.

sw.story:
Nerius had long feared the horrible memories that were engraved into Dimael’s heart.
After he lost his friends, family, and everything, Dimael’s heart was like a wasteland unable to hold anything.

Dimael even refused to draw the power of the moon that Nerius radiated.
Perhaps Dimael wished to deny his Dark Elven heritage.

However, it all changed when the mark of oath showed itself once again on his hand. Seeing the mark of oath return, it reminded Dimael of that time when he and his comrades branded that mark under the dark moonlight. Dimael’s cold heart started beating vigorously.

Dimael changed.

To protect those precious to him,
Dimael swore to lead the Dark Elves into the world. As Dimael roared and let out a fierce cry, the great darkness his soul reflected converged with the power of the moon that flows within Dimael’s Dark Elven vein.

Nerius, embraced by the great eclipse of Dimael, kneeled and answered her legendary Dark Elven master’s call.
